query:
INSERT INTO service_packages (service_type, package_name, package_code, description, category, base_price, member_price, member_discount_percent, pricing_type, estimated_hours, deliverables, features, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('design', 'Logo Design - Basic', 'DESIGN-LOGO-BASIC', 'Professional logo design with 2 initial concepts and 2 revision rounds', 'branding', 299.00, 239.20, 20, 'fixed', 8, '["Primary logo file (PNG, SVG, PDF)", "Black & white version", "Brand color palette"]', '["2 initial concepts", "2 revision rounds", "Final files in multiple formats"]', TRUE, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Logo Design - Premium', 'DESIGN-LOGO-PREMIUM', 'Comprehensive logo design with 4 concepts, unlimited revisions, and full brand guidelines', 'branding', 599.00, 479.20, 20, 'fixed', 16, '["Primary logo file (all formats)", "Logo variations", "Brand guidelines document", "Social media kit"]', '["4 initial concepts", "Unlimited revisions", "Brand guidelines", "Social media assets"]', TRUE, 2, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Brand Identity Package', 'DESIGN-BRAND-FULL', 'Complete brand identity including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines', 'branding', 1499.00, 1199.20, 20, 'fixed', 40, '["Logo suite", "Brand guidelines (20+ pages)", "Business card design", "Letterhead design", "Social media templates"]', '["Full brand strategy session", "4 logo concepts", "Complete visual identity", "Print-ready files"]', TRUE, 3, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Merchandise Design', 'DESIGN-MERCH-SINGLE', 'Single merchandise item design (t-shirt, hoodie, hat, etc.)', 'merchandise', 149.00, 119.20, 20, 'per_item', 4, '["Print-ready design file", "Mockup images", "Production specifications"]', '["1 design concept", "2 revisions", "Multiple mockup views"]', TRUE, 4, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Merchandise Collection', 'DESIGN-MERCH-COLLECTION', 'Coordinated merchandise collection design (5-10 items)', 'merchandise', 599.00, 479.20, 20, 'fixed', 20, '["Print-ready files for all items", "Product mockups", "Production guide"]', '["Cohesive collection design", "Up to 10 items", "3 revision rounds"]', TRUE, 5, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Marketing Materials', 'DESIGN-MARKETING', 'Flyers, brochures, posters, and promotional materials', 'marketing', 199.00, 159.20, 20, 'per_item', 6, '["Print-ready PDF", "Web-optimized version", "Source files"]', '["Custom design", "2 revisions", "Multiple sizes available"]', TRUE, 6, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Social Media Graphics Pack', 'DESIGN-SOCIAL-PACK', 'Custom social media graphics package (10 templates)', 'digital', 349.00, 279.20, 20, 'fixed', 12, '["10 custom templates", "Editable Canva/Figma files", "Brand-consistent designs"]', '["Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn sizes", "Story and post formats", "Editable templates"]', TRUE, 7, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Hourly Design Services', 'DESIGN-HOURLY', 'Flexible hourly design support for various projects', 'general', 75.00, 60.00, 20, 'hourly', 1, '["Work completed within agreed scope"]', '["Flexible scope", "Direct designer communication", "Quick turnaround available"]', TRUE, 8, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('design', 'Monthly Design Retainer', 'DESIGN-RETAINER-MONTHLY', 'Monthly design support subscription (20 hours/month)', 'subscription', 1200.00, 960.00, 20, 'subscription', 20, '["20 hours of design work", "Priority scheduling", "Dedicated designer"]', '["Priority support", "Rollover hours (up to 5)", "Monthly strategy call"]', TRUE, 9, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute INSERT INTO service_packages (service_type, package_name, package_code, description, category, base_price, member_price, member_discount_percent, pricing_type, estimated_hours, deliverables, features, is_active, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
